items: Launched the new premium dark website (replacing the Coming Soon page)
Recreated the logo as a crisp vector graphic (SVG)
Built 8 dedicated service pages with details of what's included
Marked MOT Testing as Coming Soon across the whole site, with a notify-me signup
Connected the newsletter signup to Brevo (subscriber list)
Connected the contact form to email delivery via Resend, with anti-spam protection
Built the admin dashboard with passwordless email sign-in
Added subscriber statistics and list to the dashboard
Made the WhatsApp number editable from the dashboard
Split the mobile bottom bar into Call Us + WhatsApp Us
Added the floating WhatsApp button with pulse animation on desktop
Added mobile hamburger menu and always-visible call bar
Added Google Analytics, Search Console and Bing integration fields with step-by-step guides
Styled the Google map to match the dark theme
SEO package: clean URLs, Open Graph previews, schema.org business data, sitemap and robots.txt
Set up automatic publishing: every change goes live within a minute

roadmap.title: Verify domain in Resend & Brevo for reliable email delivery
MOT bay launch announcement + newsletter campaign
Customer reviews section on the website
